name: Real Estate Investing & Home Staging Digital Training System
summary: A multi-product digital training system covering home staging, property flipping, and home repair with books, guides, checklists, and video training.
best_for: Homeowners and hobbyist investors who want practical, step-by-step guidance on staging and improving properties to increase value.

name: The Ultimate Crested Gecko Morph Guide
summary: A complete resource for crested gecko enthusiasts covering how to care for, understand, identify, and appreciate different crested gecko morphs.
best_for: Reptile hobbyists and new crested gecko owners who want to identify morphs and provide proper care.

name: From Trash to Treasure: The Ultimate Guide to Creative Upcycling
summary: A step-by-step guide teaching sustainable DIY projects that transform everyday waste into beautiful home decor.
best_for: Budget-conscious DIYers and eco-minded crafters who want to repurpose household items into decor pieces.

name: David's Shield
summary: A preparedness guide focused on protecting household electronics and essentials from EMP-related power disruptions.
best_for: Preparedness-minded homeowners who want practical steps to safeguard electronics and daily essentials during power disruptions.

name: The Lost SuperFoods
summary: A guide from the creators of The Lost Ways covering forgotten superfoods and long-term food storage methods for self-sufficiency.
best_for: Preppers and self-sufficiency enthusiasts who want to build a long-lasting, nutrient-dense food stockpile.
